objectives and outcomes . Disposition of final exams : Graded final exams must be kept on file on campus for thirteen months, so please arrange with course support staff to have them stored where they are available if students wish to review them. S

y are available if students wish to review them. Students may look at their graded exams under supervision, but not leave with or photocopy them. However, course support staff can make a copy for them. Put books on course reserve at the Kresge Engine
